name: codex-finish-notifier
description: Play a gentle sound and flash VS Code when Codex work finishes.

codexFinishNotifier.playSound.description: Play a notification sound when Codex completion is detected.

codexFinishNotifier.soundVolume.description: Notification sound volume as a percentage. Set to 0 to mute it.

codexFinishNotifier.soundPath.description: Path to a custom notification audio file. Leave empty to use the bundled MP3. Relative paths are resolved from the first workspace folder. You can also run 'Codex Notifier: Select Notification Sound'.

codexFinishNotifier.flashMode.description: Visual completion alert. workbenchColors flashes only the status bar and restores it; editorOverlay is kept as a status-bar-only compatibility alias.

codexFinishNotifier.stopOnInteraction.description: Stop the visual alert when the VS Code window gains focus or the user interacts with editors or terminals.

codexFinishNotifier.flashIntervalMs.description: Interval for each status bar pulse step.

codexFinishNotifier.maxFlashSeconds.description: Maximum time the visual alert should continue if there is no interaction. Set to 0 or 1 to keep it active until interaction or dismissal.

codexFinishNotifier.terminalCommandPatte.description: JavaScript regular expression used to detect Codex CLI commands in terminals with shell integration.

codexFinishNotifier.detectTerminalCodex.description: Automatically alert when a matching terminal command ends. Requires VS Code terminal shell integration.

codexFinishNotifier.detectCodexProcess.description: Automatically alert when a short-lived Codex process exits. Off by default because the OpenAI Codex extension app-server is long-lived and not one process per turn.

codexFinishNotifier.detectOpenAiCodexLog.description: Automatically alert when the OpenAI Codex extension reports that a turn has completed.

codexFinishNotifier.openAiCodexDetection.description: How to detect OpenAI Codex extension completion. chatHeuristic also catches chat-only turns by waiting for stream activity and read state to settle; conservative only uses stronger local completion markers.

codexFinishNotifier.processPollIntervalM.description: How often to check for Codex process start and exit.

codexFinishNotifier.notifyWhenWindowFocu.description: Show a small VS Code information notification when completion is detected.

codexFinishNotifier.taskbarFlash.description: On Windows, flash the VS Code taskbar icon while the completion alert is active.

codexFinishNotifier.workbenchColorTarget.description: Where temporary workbench color customizations are written when flashMode is workbenchColors.
